title: Iran Retaliates Across Gulf
detail: Iran launches massive retaliatory strikes. 137 missiles and 209 drones at UAE (3 killed, 58 injured). 65 missiles at Qatar's Al Udeid AB. Camp Buehring drone strike kills 4 US troops. Bahrain 5th Fleet HQ targeted.

title: Strait of Hormuz Shut Down
detail: IRGC Navy declares Strait of Hormuz 'closed to hostile traffic.' Over 150 tankers anchored. 15 million barrels/day of oil transit disrupted. Oil surges past $142/bbl. Lloyd's of London suspends Gulf shipping insurance.

title: IRGC Claims Hit on USS Lincoln
detail: IRGC claims anti-ship ballistic missile struck USS Abraham Lincoln. CENTCOM categorically denies: 'Not hit. Not even close.' Lincoln continues flight operations. Satellite imagery shows carrier intact.
